proposed_concepts.name: ae-cli
proposed_concepts.spec: Top-level CLI class that parses command-line arguments and dispatches to sub-commands. Entry-point for the `agentic_executables_cli` binary.
proposed_concepts.invariant: All dispatched commands return a JSON envelope unless `--human` is passed.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-generation-engine
proposed_concepts.spec: Orchestrates AI-driven codex executable generation. Coordinates prompt construction, inference calls, and output assembly.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Delegates inference to `CodexExecInferenceClient`; does not perform network I/O directly.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-inference-client
proposed_concepts.spec: Thin client responsible for making AI inference calls on behalf of `CodexExecGenerationEngine`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Stateless per-request; all configuration is passed via constructor or call parameters.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-file-writer
proposed_concepts.spec: Performs guarded, atomic file writes. Accepts `FileWriteRequest` objects and returns `FileWriteResult` / `SafeWriteBatchResult`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: A file is never partially written; on failure the original content is preserved and `FileWriteStatus` reflects the error.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-request
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object describing a single file-write operation: target path, content, and write options (`SafeWriteOptions`).
proposed_concepts.invariant: Immutable after construction; options default to safe-overwrite mode.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object returned by `SafeFileWriter` for a single write: path, `FileWriteStatus`, and optional error detail.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-write-batch-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Aggregates multiple `FileWriteResult` objects from a batch write operation and exposes summary statistics.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Batch is atomic at the result level: all individual statuses are preserved regardless of partial failure.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-status
proposed_concepts.spec: Enum encoding the outcome of a single file-write: success, skipped, overwritten, or error variants.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Exhaustive; callers must handle all variants.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-write-options
proposed_concepts.spec: Configuration value object for `FileWriteRequest`: controls overwrite policy, backup behaviour, and dry-run mode.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Defaults must be safe (no destructive action without explicit opt-in).

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-cli-resources
proposed_concepts.spec: Provides access to all assets bundled into the CLI binary at compile time (templates, documents, schemas).
proposed_concepts.invariant: Resources are read-only and version-locked to the binary build.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-document-store
proposed_concepts.spec: Key-value store of embedded documents (e.g. prompt templates, reference docs) surfaced through `EmbeddedCliResources`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Documents are resolved by stable string keys; missing-key lookups return null rather than throwing.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-skill-template-provider
proposed_concepts.spec: Supplies skill templates from the embedded document store. Implements the same provider interface as `FileSkillTemplateProvider`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Templates are served from compile-time-embedded bytes; no filesystem access at runtime.

proposed_concepts.name: file-skill-template-provider
proposed_concepts.spec: Supplies skill templates loaded from the filesystem at runtime, enabling local overrides of embedded templates.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Falls back to `EmbeddedSkillTemplateProvider` when the requested template file is absent.

proposed_concepts.name: spec-export-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object returned by `exportSpec`: carries the exported specification content and metadata about the export operation.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Always non-null after a successful export; contains both raw content and format metadata.

proposed_concepts.name: json-envelope-output
proposed_concepts.spec: Every CLI command serialises its result into a JSON envelope before writing to stdout. The envelope schema is uniform across commands.
proposed_concepts.invariant: No command writes plain text to stdout by default; the `--human` flag is the only sanctioned escape hatch.
proposed_concepts.rationale: Cross-cutting output contract spanning all commands; not a single symbol — belongs as a concept-level invariant rather than a feature row.

proposed_concepts.name: human-readable-flag
proposed_concepts.spec: Global `--human` CLI flag that switches all command output from JSON to human-readable prose without altering command semantics or exit codes.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Flag must be parsed at the top-level `AeCli` layer before dispatch so every sub-command inherits the setting.
proposed_concepts.rationale: Cross-cutting presentation toggle that affects all commands uniformly; not owned by any single symbol.
